texto: Hatred is exhausting. You must constantly remind yourself why you hate someone and waste needless energy to keep hating them.Forgiveness
autor: you only need to do it once!
explicacao: Orientação direta de you only need to do it once! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Hatred is exhausting. You must constantly remind yourself why you hate someone and waste needless…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, savania-china, hatred, útil em momentos de reflexao.
